SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.watertreatment

Class OilInWaterDoseOptimizer

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.watertreatment.OilInWaterDoseOptimizer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class OilInWaterDoseOptimizer extends Object implements Serializable
Decision-support optimizer for demulsifier dose and monthly OIW warning workflows.

The optimizer combines a calibrated dose-response model, chemical lag model, analyzer drift model, and monthly weighted OIW monitor. It scans a bounded dose range and returns the lowest dose expected to satisfy the tighter of the regulatory target and remaining monthly budget.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • OilInWaterDoseOptimizer

      public OilInWaterDoseOptimizer()
      Creates an optimizer with default model instances.

  • Method Details

    • recommendDose

      public OilInWaterDoseOptimizer.DoseRecommendation recommendDose(double untreatedOilInWaterMgL, double waterRateM3h, int dayOfMonth)
      Recommends the lowest demulsifier dose meeting the current monthly OIW target.
      Parameters:
      untreatedOilInWaterMgL - untreated or pre-chemical OIW in mg/L
      waterRateM3h - produced-water flow rate in m3/h
      dayOfMonth - current day of month, starting at 1
      Returns:
      dose recommendation

    • recommendDose

      public OilInWaterDoseOptimizer.DoseRecommendation recommendDose(double untreatedOilInWaterMgL, double waterRateM3h, double daysSinceAnalyzerCalibration, int dayOfMonth)
      Recommends the lowest dose while accounting for analyzer drift age.
      Parameters:
      untreatedOilInWaterMgL - untreated or pre-chemical OIW in mg/L
      waterRateM3h - produced-water flow rate in m3/h
      daysSinceAnalyzerCalibration - days since analyzer calibration
      dayOfMonth - current day of month, starting at 1
      Returns:
      dose recommendation

    • addMonthlySample

      public void addMonthlySample(double oilInWaterMgL, double waterVolumeM3)
      Adds a monthly sample to the internal monitor.
      Parameters:
      oilInWaterMgL - OIW concentration in mg/L
      waterVolumeM3 - water volume in m3

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Serializes optimizer configuration and the last recommendation to JSON.
      Returns:
      JSON representation

    • calculateTargetOilInWater

      private double calculateTargetOilInWater(OilInWaterMonthlyComplianceMonitor.MonthlyStatus monthlyStatus)
      Calculates the target OIW from the regulatory limit and remaining monthly budget.
      Parameters:
      monthlyStatus - monthly compliance status
      Returns:
      target OIW in mg/L

    • evaluateDose

      private OilInWaterDoseOptimizer.DoseRecommendation evaluateDose(double setpointDosePpm, double untreatedOilInWaterMgL, double waterRateM3h, double daysSinceAnalyzerCalibration, double targetOilInWaterMgL)
      Evaluates one setpoint dose.
      Parameters:
      setpointDosePpm - setpoint dose in ppm
      untreatedOilInWaterMgL - untreated OIW in mg/L
      waterRateM3h - produced-water flow rate in m3/h
      daysSinceAnalyzerCalibration - days since analyzer calibration
      targetOilInWaterMgL - target OIW in mg/L
      Returns:
      dose recommendation candidate

    • predictEffectiveDose

      private double predictEffectiveDose(double setpointDosePpm, double waterRateM3h)
      Predicts effective dose from setpoint without mutating the optimizer lag state.
      Parameters:
      setpointDosePpm - setpoint dose in ppm
      waterRateM3h - water rate in m3/h
      Returns:
      effective dose in ppm
